revision.text: {{Navbox | name = Shi-Tennoji Gakuen | title = Shi-Tennoji Gakuen (ňşŽŠáíŠ│Ľń║║ňŤŤňĄęšÄőň»║ňşŽňťĺ) | titlestyle = background:#0f218b; color:#fff; | listclass = hlist | group1 = Institutions | list1 = {{Navbox|child | group1 = Tertiary | list1 = * [[Shitennoji University]] (International Buddhist University) * {{ill|Shitennouji University Junior College|ja|ňŤŤňĄęšÄőň»║ňĄžňşŽščşŠťčňĄžňşŽÚâĘ}} | group2 = Secondary | list2 = * [[Shitennoji Junior and Senior High School]] * [[Shitennoji Gakuen Junior and Senior High School]] | group3 = Primary | list3 = Shi-Tennoji Primary School ([[:ja:ňŤŤňĄęšÄőň»║ň░ĆňşŽŠáí|JA]]) | group4 = Defunct | list4 = * [[Shitennoji Habikigaoka Junior and Senior High School]] * [[Shi-Tennoji School in UK]] }} | group2 = See also | list2 = [[Shitenn┼Ź-ji]] }} [[Category:Japan education navigational boxes]] [[Category:Shitenn┼Ź-ji| ]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Navbox | name = Shi-Tennoji Gakuen | title = Shi-Tennoji Gakuen (ňşŽŠáíŠ│Ľń║║ňŤŤňĄęšÄőň»║ňşŽňťĺ) | titlestyle = background:#0f218b; color:#fff; | listclass = hlist | group1 = Institutions | list1 = {{Navbox|child | group1 = Tertiary | list1 = * [[:en:Shitennoji University|Shitennoji University]] (International Buddhist University) * {{ill|Shitennouji University Junior College|ja|ňŤŤňĄęšÄőň»║ňĄžňşŽščşŠťčňĄžňşŽÚâĘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitennouji University Junior College|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitennouji University Junior College|qq=}} | group2 = Secondary | list2 = * [[:en:Shitennoji Junior and Senior High School|Shitennoji Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Shitennoji Gakuen Junior and Senior High School|Shitennoji Gakuen Junior and Senior High School]] | group3 = Primary | list3 = Shi-Tennoji Primary School ([[:ja:ňŤŤňĄęšÄőň»║ň░ĆňşŽŠáí|JA]]) | group4 = Defunct | list4 = * [[:en:Shitennoji Habikigaoka Junior and Senior High School|Shitennoji Habikigaoka Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Shi-Tennoji School in UK|Shi-Tennoji School in UK]] }} | group2 = See also | list2 = [[Shitenn┼Ź-ji]] }} [[Category:Japan education navigational boxes]] [[Category:Shitenn┼Ź-ji| ]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Navbox | name = Shi-Tennoji Gakuen | title = Shi-Tennoji Gakuen (ňşŽŠáíŠ│Ľń║║ňŤŤňĄęšÄőň»║ňşŽňťĺ) | titlestyle = background:#0f218b; color:#fff; | listclass = hlist | group1 = Institutions | list1 = {{Navbox|child | group1 = Tertiary | list1 = * [[:en:Shitennoji University|Shitennoji University]] (International Buddhist University) * {{ill|Shitennouji University Junior College|ja|ňŤŤňĄęšÄőň»║ňĄžňşŽščşŠťčňĄžňşŽÚâĘ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitennouji University Junior College|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitennouji University Junior College|qq=}} | group2 = Secondary | list2 = * [[:en:Shitennoji Junior and Senior High School|Shitennoji Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Shitennoji Gakuen Junior and Senior High School|Shitennoji Gakuen Junior and Senior High School]] | group3 = Primary | list3 = Shi-Tennoji Primary School ([[:ja:ňŤŤňĄęšÄőň»║ň░ĆňşŽŠáí|JA]]) | group4 = Defunct | list4 = * [[:en:Shitennoji Habikigaoka Junior and Senior High School|Shitennoji Habikigaoka Junior and Senior High School]] * [[:en:Shi-Tennoji School in UK|Shi-Tennoji School in UK]] }} | group2 = See also | list2 = [[Shitenn┼Ź-ji]] }} [[Category:Japan education navigational boxes]] [[Category:Shitenn┼Ź-ji| ]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
